---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="page-banner">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
    <h1>Help & Support</h1>
    <p>Find answers to common questions about the data and the portal</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ ACCORDION -->
<section style="max-width:900px;margin:3rem auto;padding:0 2rem;">
  <h2 style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;">Frequently Asked Questions</h2>

  <style>
    .faq-item { margin-bottom:1rem; }
    .faq-title {
      background: var(--map-navy, #1a2332);
      color: white;
      padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-weight: 600;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    }
    .faq-title:hover {
      background: var(--map-navy-light, #243044);
      border-color: rgba(201,162,39,0.3);
    }
    .faq-content {
      display: none;
      background: var(--map-bg-section, #f1f5f9);
      padding: 1.5rem;
      border-left: 4px solid var(--map-red, #c9a227);
      border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
      line-height: 1.7;
      color: var(--map-text-muted, #64748b);
    }
    .faq-item.active .faq-content { display: block; }
    .faq-toggle {
      display: inline-block;
      transition: transform 0.2s ease;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
    }
    .faq-item.active .faq-toggle { transform: rotate(180deg); }
  </style>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How do I access the health facilities data?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Navigate to the <a href="registry.html" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Country Data</a> page and select your country of interest.
      You can explore the interactive map to view facility locations and then download the full dataset in CSV format.
      All data is openly downloadable.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How do I find a nearby health facility?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Use our <a href="find-facility.html" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Find Facility</a> tool. Allow your browser to detect your location (or enter coordinates manually),
      select the service type you need, and the system will show you the nearest facilities offering that service on an interactive map.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>What file formats are available for download?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Data is provided as <strong>CSV</strong> &mdash; standard comma-separated values for spreadsheet and statistical analysis.
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How frequently is the data updated?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Core facility lists are updated quarterly when new data sources become available. Service availability data
      is refreshed when Ministries of Health publish new registry exports. Coordinate validation is ongoing. Each dataset release includes
      a version number and changelog so you can track what has changed.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>What countries are currently covered?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      Coverage is expanding across Sub-Saharan Africa. Visit the
      <a href="registry.html" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">Registry Explorer</a> page to see which countries are currently available.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="faq-item">
    <div class="faq-title" onclick="this.parentElement.classList.toggle('active')">
      <span>How do I report data quality issues or errors?</span>
      <span class="faq-toggle">&#9660;</span>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-content">
      If you discover errors or inconsistencies in the data, we appreciate feedback!
      Email the <a href="mailto:cmyalla@ihi.or.tz" style="color:var(--map-red);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">DET Team</a>
      with the country, facility name, and a description of the issue.
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EMAIL CONTACT -->
<section style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto 3rem;padding:2rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(201,162,39,0.04) 0%,rgba(37,99,235,0.03) 100%);border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e2e8f0);border-radius:12px;text-align:center;">
  <h3 style="margin-top:0;">Email Contact</h3>
  <p style="color:var(--map-text-muted,#64748b);margin-bottom:1rem;">Prefer direct email? Reach out to our team:</p>
  <p style="margin:0;font-size:1.1rem;">
    <a href="mailto:cmyalla@ihi.or.tz" style="color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;">DET Team</a>
  </p>
  <p style="color:var(--map-text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;margin-top:0.5rem;">We typically respond within 2&ndash;3 business days.</p>
</section>
```
